description: As a Sustainability Specialist evaluating the feasibility of a marine hydrokinetic (MHK) wave energy converter, use PySAM's `MhkWave` module to model a 300 kW converter. Load the default configuration and set the system rated capacity to 300 kW. Configure the following loss percentages: array spacing loss at 0%, resource overprediction loss at 5%, transmission loss at 2%, downtime loss at 5%, and additional loss at 0%. Keep the default wave resource and device power matrices unchanged. Execute the simulation and save the results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/wave_energy_results.json as a JSON object with these exact keys: "annual_energy_kwh", "capacity_factor_percent", "device_average_power_kw", "system_capacity_kw", "loss_array_spacing_pct", "loss_resource_overprediction_pct", "loss_transmission_pct", "loss_downtime_pct", "loss_additional_pct", "wave_resource_matrix_rows", and "wave_resource_matrix_cols".
